name: Dawarich
short_desc: Self-hosted location tracking - Google Timeline alternative
author: Freika
description: Dawarich is a self-hosted alternative to Google Location History. Track your location history, visualize it on a map, and have complete control over your data.

form_fields.label: Admin Email
form_fields.hint: Email for your admin account (replaces default demo account)

form_fields.label: Photon API Host
form_fields.hint: Custom Photon API host for self-hosted reverse geocoding

form_fields.label: Photon API Key
form_fields.hint: Photon API key (e.g., from Dawarich Patreon)

form_fields.label: Photon API Use HTTPS
form_fields.hint: Use HTTPS for Photon API requests

form_fields.label: Geoapify API Key
form_fields.hint: API key for Geoapify reverse geocoding service

form_fields.label: Nominatim API Host
form_fields.hint: Custom Nominatim API host for self-hosted reverse geocoding

form_fields.label: Nominatim API Key
form_fields.hint: API key for Nominatim reverse geocoding service

form_fields.label: Nominatim API Use HTTPS
form_fields.hint: Use HTTPS for Nominatim API requests
